SKT_FIRST.name: Dark Slash
SKT_FIRST.true_desc: Attacks an enemy.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to grant Increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与えた後、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_kr: 적을 공격한 후 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
SKT_FIRST.true_desc_zh: 攻击敌人后,有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

SKT_SECOND.name: Dark Devil Dance
SKT_SECOND.true_desc: Attacks an enemy.\nIf this attack kills the target, performs an <color=#28d9ed>additional attack</color> against all enemies.
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこの攻撃で対象を倒した時、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>追加攻撃</color>を与える。
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 공격으로 대상이 사망할 경우, 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>추가 공격</color>을 사용합니다.
SKT_SECOND.true_desc_zh: 攻击敌人。\n该攻击致使目标死亡时,对全体敌人施展<color=#28d9ed>额外攻击</color>。

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Dark Ruler's Slash
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc: Attacks all enemies.\nIf this attack scores a critical hit, increases Critical Damage. After using this skill, reduces the skill cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Dark Devil Dance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、会心ダメージがUPする。スキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>【暗黒魔演舞】</color>のスキルターンが<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少する。
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n이 공격이 치명 공격으로 적중할 경우 치명 피해가 증가합니다. 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>암흑마연무</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소합니다.
SKT_ULTIMATE.true_desc_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n当该攻击以暴击命中时,使暴击伤害提升。使用技能后,<color=#28d9ed>暗黑魔焰舞</color>的技能冷却时间减少\n<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Reduces Dark Devil Dance Cooldown by 2 turns
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 【暗黒魔演舞】スキルターン-2ターン
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 暗黑魔焰舞冷却时间-2回合

SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.name: Chain Passive
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: Increases Critical Hit Chance of the attack by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to increase <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:この攻撃の会心率が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 해당 공격의 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
SKT_CHAIN_PASSIVE.true_desc_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:使该技能的暴击率提升<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: Increases Critical Hit Chance of the attack by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to increase <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:この攻撃の会心率が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 해당 공격의 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:使该技能的暴击率提升<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: Increases Critical Hit Chance of the attack by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to increase <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> of the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:この攻撃の会心率が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
